messages.content: PM Kisan ke liye kaun eligible hai? Who is eligible for PM Kisan?

PM Kisan ke liye eligibility: Small aur marginal farmer families jiske paas 2 hectare (approximately 5 acres) tak ki cultivable land ho. Excluded hain: income tax payers, Rs. 10,000+ monthly pension pane wale retired employees, doctors/lawyers/engineers/CAs jaise professionals, aur former/current MPs, MLAs, ministers.
PM Kisan mein kitna paisa milta hai? What are the benefits of PM Kisan?

PM Kisan ke antargat eligible farmers ko Rs. 6,000 prativarsh milte hain, jo teen equal kiston mein — har 4 mahine mein Rs. 2,000 — seedha bank account mein Direct Benefit Transfer (DBT) ke zariye bheje jaate hain.
PM Kisan ke liye kaise apply karein? How to apply for PM Kisan?

PM Kisan ke liye apply karne ke liye: 1) pmkisan.gov.in par jaayein ya nearest Common Service Centre (CSC) pe jaayen. 2) Farmer Registration form bharen. Documents chahiye: Aadhaar card, khaata/khatauni (land records), aur bank passbook.
Ayushman Bharat ke liye kaun eligible hai? Who is eligible for Ayushman Bharat?

Ayushman Bharat PM-JAY ke liye SECC 2011 (Socio-Economic Caste Census) database mein listed poor aur vulnerable families eligible hain. Koi age, family size, ya gender ki limit nahi hai. Apna naam check karne ke liye pmjay.gov.in par jaayein ya 14555 helpline call karein.
Ayushman Bharat mein kya milta hai? What are the benefits of Ayushman Bharat?

Ayushman Bharat PM-JAY mein har family ko Rs. 5 lakh prativarsh ka health insurance milta hai. Iske under 1,500+ se zyada medical procedures covered hain. Empanelled government aur private hospitals mein cashless treatment milta hai. Pre-existing diseases bhi covered hain.
Ujjwala Yojana ke liye kaun eligible hai? Who is eligible for Ujjwala Yojana?

PM Ujjwala Yojana ke liye eligibility: 18 saal se upar ki mahila jo BPL (Below Poverty Line) family se ho. Ghar mein pehle se koi LPG connection nahi hona chahiye. SECC-2011 database mein listed hona chahiye ya BPL ration card holder hona chahiye.
Ujjwala Yojana mein kya milta hai? What are the benefits of Ujjwala Yojana?
PM Ujjwala Yojana ke antargat BPL mahilaon ko free LPG connection milta hai. Isme deposit waiver aur pehle refill par subsidy bhi milti hai. Har saal 12 LPG cylinders subsidised rate par milte hain.
Ujjwala Yojana mein free gas connection kaise milega? How to get free LPG connection under Ujjwala Yojana?

PM Ujjwala Yojana mein free LPG connection ke liye: 1) Apne nearest LPG distributor (HP Gas, Bharat Gas, ya Indane) ke paas jaayein. 2) KYC form bharen aur BPL ration card / SECC card / Aadhaar card submit karein. 3) Aadhar se linked bank account ki details den. Connection approved hone par free cylinder aur regulator milega. Apply online bhi kar sakte hain: pmuy.gov.in par.

scheme_name: Mahatma Gandhi National Rural Employment Guarantee

messages.content: MGNREGA ke liye kaun eligible hai? Who is eligible for MGNREGA?

MGNREGA ke liye koi bhi 18+ saal ka vyakti jo rural household mein rehta ho aur unskilled manual kaam karne ke liye taiyaar ho, eligible hai. Job card ke liye apni Gram Panchayat mein registration karaayen. Koi income ya land limit nahi hai.

scheme_name: Mahatma Gandhi National Rural Employment Guarantee

messages.content: MGNREGA mein kya milta hai? What are the benefits of MGNREGA?

MGNREGA ke antargat: guaranteed 100 din ka rozgaar prativarsh per rural household. State-wise minimum wage ka bhugtan 15 din ke andar seedha bank/post office account mein. Agar 15 din mein kaam na mile to unemployment allowance bhi milta hai.
PM Awas Yojana Gramin ke liye kaun eligible hai? Who is eligible for PMAY-G?

PMAY-Gramin ke liye: SECC 2011 data mein listed houseless ya kutcha/dilapidated ghar mein rehne wale log eligible hain. Priority: SC/ST, minorities, ex-servicemen, disabled persons, aur flood-prone areas ke log. Pehle se pucca ghar hone par eligible nahi hain.
PM Awas Yojana Gramin mein kitna paisa milta hai? What are the benefits of PMAY-G?

PMAY-Gramin mein: plain areas mein Rs. 1.20 lakh aur hilly/difficult areas mein Rs. 1.30 lakh ghar banane ke liye milte hain. MGNREGA se 90-95 din ka labour bhi milta hai. Swachh Bharat Mission se shauchalaya bhi milta hai. Raqam seedha bank account mein aati hai.
Mudra loan ke liye kaun eligible hai? Who is eligible for Mudra loan?

Pradhan Mantri Mudra Yojana ke liye: koi bhi non-farm small/micro business owner eligible hai. Teen categories hain: Shishu (up to Rs. 50,000), Kishor (Rs. 50,001-5 lakh), Tarun (Rs. 5-10 lakh). Banks, MFIs, NBFCs sab Mudra loans dete hain.
Kisan Credit Card ke liye kaun eligible hai? Who is eligible for Kisan Credit Card?

Kisan Credit Card (KCC) ke liye: individual farmers, SHG members, tenant farmers, sharecroppers, oral lessees eligible hain. Allied activities (animal husbandry, fisheries) ke liye bhi KCC milta hai. Short-term credit needs ke liye yeh flexible revolving credit deta hai.
Sukanya Samriddhi Yojana ke liye kaun eligible hai? Who is eligible for Sukanya Samriddhi Yojana?

Sukanya Samriddhi Yojana ke liye: 10 saal se kam umra ki beti ke naam par account khola ja sakta hai. Ek family mein zyada se zyada 2 betiyon ke liye account. Minimum Rs. 250 se account khul jaata hai, maximum Rs. 1.5 lakh prativarsh. Post office ya authorized banks mein khol sakte hain.
Atal Pension Yojana ke liye kaun eligible hai? Who is eligible for Atal Pension Yojana?

Atal Pension Yojana ke liye: 18-40 saal ki umra ke Indian citizens eligible hain jo income tax payer nahi hain. Savings bank account hona zaroori hai. 60 saal ki umra ke baad Rs. 1,000 se Rs. 5,000 pratimaah guaranteed pension milti hai (contribution ke hisaab se).
